# Error Handling Checklist: Platform Mechanics Spike

**Purpose**: Validate TACD-001 error-handling requirements for absent capabilities, unsupported or unverified runtime mechanics, ambiguous active-vs-historical references, sanitized probe evidence, and no-assumption reporting.
**Created**: 2026-06-17
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Absent Capability Fallbacks

- [x] CHK001 Does the report scope require both Claude Code and Codex to cover installed tools, MCP/app connectors, skills/plugins, and repo-local helpers? [Coverage, Spec FR-005, Spec FR-006a]
- [x] CHK002 Does the report plan require every runtime-by-capability matrix cell to record the fallback behavior when that capability class is absent, unsupported, or unavailable? [Resolved, Spec FR-013a, Plan Platform Mechanics Plan, Data Model Runtime-by-Capability Matrix Cell]
- [x] CHK003 Do TACD-004 eval-plan requirements include missing-capability fallback behavior for both runtimes without adding final eval tests in TACD-001? [Coverage, Spec FR-009a, Spec FR-009b]
- [x] CHK004 Does TACD-001 keep behavior-changing fallback implementation in TACD-002 or later instead of changing active runtime guidance now? [Scope, Spec FR-010, Spec FR-011]

## Unsupported Or Unverified Mechanics

- [x] CHK005 Are runtime mechanics allowed to be labeled unsupported, unresolved, or environment-specific instead of being forced into a supported path? [Clarity, Spec FR-006a, Spec FR-006c]
- [x] CHK006 Does the data model require matrix cells themselves to include confidence and confidence rationale, matching SC-008's requirement for 100% of matrix cells? [Resolved, Spec SC-008, Data Model Runtime-by-Capability Matrix Cell]
- [x] CHK007 Do unresolved mechanics have to name missing evidence and the downstream owner or reviewer decision needed? [Clarity, Spec FR-006c, Data Model Runtime-by-Capability Matrix Cell]
- [x] CHK008 Do probe appendix rules preserve reproducibility while excluding raw inventories, connector lists, identifiers, tokens, local paths, and full transcripts? [Safety, Spec FR-006b, Spec FR-015]

## Ambiguous Named-Tool Categories

- [x] CHK009 Are active runtime guidance, runtime/dependency metadata, prerequisite/user-facing messaging, deterministic/eval expectations, generated duplicates, historical/provenance, and fixture/test-only references separated? [Completeness, Spec FR-004, Plan TACD-004 Allowlist Categories]
- [x] CHK010 Is there an explicit rule for ambiguous active-vs-historical named-tool references so the report does not silently classify them as active guidance or historical provenance? [Resolved, Spec FR-013b, Plan Ambiguous Category Handling, Data Model Allowlist Category]
- [x] CHK011 Are mixed files classified at the reference level rather than only at the file level? [Precision, Spec Edge Cases, Data Model Runtime Surface]
- [x] CHK012 Does the scope preserve historical changelog, archive, provenance, and intentional fixture references? [Scope, Spec FR-014]

## No-Assumption Reporting

- [x] CHK013 Does reviewer validation require checking that unsupported, unresolved, unavailable, or ambiguous mechanics are explicitly recorded rather than converted into implementation assumptions? [Resolved, Quickstart Scenario 7]
- [x] CHK014 Does the directive-home rule fall back to runtime-specific equivalents when shared-reference coverage or planned eval coverage is incomplete? [Error handling, Spec FR-007, Plan Directive-Home Recommendation Rule]
- [x] CHK015 Does the report use local repository evidence first and cite official platform sources only when local files cannot prove current platform mechanics? [Evidence, Spec FR-012]
- [x] CHK016 Are no-behavior-change boundaries measurable for runtime guidance, prerequisite behavior, public docs messaging, final enforcement tests, plugin versions, and generated payload semantics? [Scope, Spec FR-011, Spec SC-005]

## Verification Run 2

- [x] CHK017 Do spec requirements now require absent-capability dispositions and ambiguous category review without authorizing runtime behavior changes? [Resolved, Spec FR-013a, Spec FR-013b, Spec FR-011]
- [x] CHK018 Does the plan now require matrix-cell evidence state, confidence, confidence rationale, and absent-capability disposition? [Resolved, Plan Platform Mechanics Plan]
- [x] CHK019 Does the data model now expose fields for confidence rationale, absent-capability disposition, and ambiguous/requires-review categories? [Resolved, Data Model Capability Mechanics Evidence, Runtime-by-Capability Matrix Cell, Allowlist Category]
- [x] CHK020 Does quickstart validation now check that unsupported, unresolved, environment-specific, and ambiguous mechanics stay explicit in the report? [Resolved, Quickstart Scenario 7]
